abilities.description: Reveal the top card of your library and put it into your hand. CARDNAME deals damage to himself equal to that card's mana value.
Target creature's controller sacrifices it, then that player creates a 5/5 red Dragon creature token with flying.

abilities.description: Each Dragon creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target player or planeswalker.
